task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N120 engineering-requirement-parsing artifact. The ground truth is at: 工程需求解析.md (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

# CinemaAI Engineering Requirement Inventory (v0.4)

> **Purpose**: Translate PRD-level business capabilities into traceable, stack-agnostic engineering obligations. All `er_id`s are stable and backward-compatible with N070 artifacts (`REQ-*`, `RULE-*`, `SM-*`, `OBJ-*`). `tech_stack_binding: abstract` enforced per N120 workflow rules.

---

## ER-001 — AI Script Generation Capability
- `er_tier`: t1_capability
- `technical_aspects`: ["concurrency", "idempotency", "observability"]
- `implied_needs`: ["isolation level for concurrent prompt variants", "idempotency key derived from scene_id + seed + model_version", "latency SLO < 8s p95 for 500-token output"]
- `recognized_patterns`: ["idempotent_consumer"]
- `actors`: ["script_writer", "ai_engine"]
- `objects`: ["scene_draft", "prompt_template"]
- `triggers`: ["user submits prompt", "auto-regenerate on scene edit"]
- `acceptance`: ["identical input → identical output across retries", "SLO violation triggers alert to N130"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["performance: latency_p95_8s", "reliability: retry_on_timeout"]
- `dependencies`: ["LLM inference gateway", "prompt version registry"]
- `risks`: ["model drift may break deterministic output"]
- `open_questions`: ["Is deterministic sampling enabled at LLM provider level?"]
- `emitted_api_candidates`: [{"api_id": "AI-GEN-001", "name": "POST /v1/scripts/generate", "confidence": "inferred"}]
- `confidence`: explicit
- `source_requirements`: ["REQ-001-007", "REQ-012-015"]

- `implied_needs`: ["optimistic locking strategy for scene objects", "cache stampede protection during peak sync", "at-least-once delivery for presence updates"]
- `recognized_patterns`: ["optimistic_locking", "outbox_event_relay"]
- `actors`: ["director", "editor", "assistant_director"]
- `objects`: ["scene", "shot_list", "timing_marks"]
- `triggers`: ["WebSocket message", "autosave interval (30s)"]
- `acceptance`: ["no silent overwrites when two users edit same field simultaneously"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["consistency: last-write-wins_with_conflict_resolution"]
- `dependencies`: ["real-time sync service", "conflict resolution UI component"]
- `risks`: ["CRDT not supported by current frontend framework"]
- `open_questions`: ["What is the conflict resolution UX spec? (see REQ-042-045)"]
- `confidence`: pending
- `source_requirements`: ["REQ-042-045"]
